title: ↩️ Restoring a deleted board view via the board activity log is in gradual release ↩️
excerpt:
No more heart-drop moments after a board view is deleted accidentally! We’ve made some necessary changes to ensure the board view is :dizzy: restored :dizzy: as easily as it was deleted… 
How do you feel about this impro…

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
No more heart-drop moments after a board view is deleted accidentally! We’ve made some necessary changes to ensure the board view is restored as easily as it was deleted…

How do you feel about this improvement? Life saver, yes?!

image725×175 39.9 KB

posts.author: adinap (Adina Pierce)
posts.cookedHtml: I love the new feature! Can you tell me how many days a deleted view stays in the activity log? I want to temporarily delete a view (form) and bring it back at a later date, but want to make sure it doesn’t disappear after 30 days.

posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml:
@adinap - The recycle (delete) bin only retains things for 30 days. What it sounds like you want is to be able to Archive a board view. Currently that is not supported.

~ Deb Cinkus, PMP

CEO & Principal Consultant, Polished Geek
